description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a classic silhouette, featuring a black canvas upper and white rubber toe cap. The shoe has white laces threaded through metal eyelets, and a white midsole with a black stripe running along its length. Visible stitching outlines the panels and adds structural detail, while the heel displays a branded patch. The outsole is made of durable rubber, designed for traction and everyday urban use. The overall design is iconic and casual, suitable for walking on city streets or in parks.
description: A black canvas low-top sneaker with white laces, rubber toe cap, and a white midsole with a black stripe.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black canvas upper, white laces, and the full length of the white midsole with a black stripe.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel patch, vertical stitching, and the back of the white sole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the black canvas and white laces, with visible eyelets and stitching.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rounded white rubber toe cap, lacing pattern, and tongue label.
attribute_logo: Rectangular patch on the heel, white with black text
